docs.title: About
docs.text: I am an assistant professor at University of Central Oklahoma. I obtained my Ph.D. degree in the department of computer science and engineering at University of South Carolina. I also serve as the Graduate Program Advisor at the department of computer science. The major responsibility of this role is to assist graduate students with their study plan and enrollment needs throughout their college journey. My main research interest is System and Software Security, with a focus on data-driven binary analysis, Internet of Things, and mobile computing. I also work on adversarial machine learning.

docs.title: News and Ads
docs.text:
• Our department has created a strong hands-on cybersecurity program. Please find more information here.

  • We are organizing a workshop in conjunction with MASS'24. Please consider submitting your work and joining us at Seoul, South Korea, September 23-25, 2024.

docs.title: Past Activities
docs.text:
• Joined the Editorial Board of Digital Threats: Research and Practice as an associate editor. Welcome to submit your research work to this peer-reviewed ACM journal.

  • Travel award from the 4th HPC Security Workshop. I attended this exciting event and the co-organized 3rd OAK Supercomputing Conference at Wichita, Kansas, May 20-23, 2024.

  • Served on the program committee of RAID'24 and DBSec'24.

  • Presented research work for the 2024 Research Day at the Oklahoma Capitol as the representative of UCO, Mar. 2024.

  • Delivered a research talk at University of Southern Maine, Oct. 2023.

docs.title: Teaching
docs.text: This class covers materials for CompTIA Linux+ Certificate, and partially covers Security+ Certificate.
